PUH-BrianMartell-Powerful idea: the final state of a cosmic cycle, everything collapses into one high-tension Planck star / polariton unit, the information of the entire universe is not lost. Instead, it is encoded as permanent geometric configurations (tilts, twists, alignments) in the E₈ lattice shell of that final core. This shell acts like a cosmic hard drive. During next Rebound, shell fragments and is blasted outward. The pre-arranged lattice geometry carries “scars” and templates from the previous aeon. As new spacetime inflates, these fragments become the seeds for density variations, galaxies, and structure — replacing the need for standard inflation. Information is preserved topologically, avoiding the black-hole information paradox and the heat-death-of-cycles problem. This builds directly on T140 (Complete Amalgamation): the final amalgamation creates the ultimate core whose lattice geometry stores the record. It ties into T206 (topological permanence), T172 (Casimir invariants), T170
